span.p:
Stage 0: Session Context
Load last 10 turns from Redis/PostgreSQL

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 1: Input Guardrails
Regex PII + injection detection

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stage 2: Query Rewriting
Pronoun resolution via LLM

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 3: Intent Classification
9 intents + confidence + domain relevance

Reasoning + tool calls, max 8 iterations
